# Issue Template

Before opening an issue:

- Do not include EvoLink API keys.
- Include the package version or commit hash.
- Include the command, sanitized output, and task ID if available.

## Type

- [ ] API bug
- [ ] Documentation issue
- [ ] Agent installation issue
- [ ] npm packaging issue
